findings.blocker: Presheaf residual `(PresheafOfModules.pullback φ.hom).obj (M.val ⊗ₚ N.val) ≅ (M.restrict f).val ⊗ₚ (N.restrict f).val` is NOT a bounded sectionwise unfolding: `PresheafOfModules.pullback` is the opaque abstract left adjoint of pushforward with no sectionwise formula. Genuine route needs 2 Mathlib-absent ingredients (H1 presheaf-level `pushforward β ≅ pullback φ` via leftAdjointUniq; H2 strong-monoidal restrictScalars along ring iso), ~200-300 LOC mathlib-build across 4 absent Mathlib lemmas. The iter-208 plan's Route-A `30-60 LOC` premise wrong by ~5x; armed reversal pre-commitment FIRED.

attempts.goal_before: (PresheafOfModules.pullback (Hom.toRingCatSheafHom f).hom ⋙ PresheafOfModules.sheafification (𝟙 Y.ringCatSheaf.obj)).obj (PresheafOfModules.Monoidal.tensorObj M.val N.val) ≅ (M.restrict f).tensorObj (N.restrict f)
attempts.insight: Step succeeds and is verified, but reveals the recipe is wrong: the residual is the opaque-pullback base-change iso, NOT a sectionwise unfolding. `restrict_obj` is rfl because `M.restrict f = SheafOfModules.pushforward β` (concrete pushforward), NOT a pullback — the recipe conflated opaque `pullback` with concrete `pushforward`.
